name: Z-VH100
purpose: Defensive security posture engine: Vegeta-style defense and challenge logic plus Harisha/Hashirai mentor-guardian discipline — boosting Z-MCBURB, Z-FBAP, ZAG, Z-Traffic, Z-CAR², NAV/ZSX, and future AI Tower awareness without becoming an attack or surveillance tool.

vegeta_pillar.meaning: No-nonsense challenge to unsafe shortcuts: verify gates, refuse silent escalation, demand evidence before widen scope.

harisha_hashirai_pillar.meaning: Harisha / Hashirai 100 — mentor-guardian layer and 100-point protection discipline: proportionality, care, and human-in-the-loop escalation.

posture_levels.label: Observer
posture_levels.description: Read doctrine and metadata; no automated enforcement.

posture_levels.label: Advisor
posture_levels.description: Classify risk and emit hints in reports; still no auto-block.

posture_levels.label: Guarded hygiene
posture_levels.description: Operator-invoked safe fixes only; never silent on production truth.

posture_levels.label: Human gate
posture_levels.description: Any material security posture change or public claim requires AMK/human.

severity_bands.description: Informational; no action required beyond awareness.
Track in next heartbeat; optional doc or registry refresh.
Schedule human review; may elevate MCBURB/FBAP signals.
Stop widening scope; Z-Traffic and DRP path before proceed.
Assume breach or governance break risk; human gate mandatory.

response_modes.description: Record posture in receipts; no mutation.
List gated steps (rollback, charter, DRP review); operator executes.
Route to mentor-guardian review (Hashirai layer) — human calendar, not bot autonomy.
Refuse further autonomous scripts in the affected lane until ZAG and human gate clear — not network block of users.

related_systems.role: Backup/reconvergence severity framing; VH100 informs how hard to treat drift.
Fire-backs event taxonomy; VH100 aligns severity and response mode vocabulary.
Security posture hints aggregate with minibots chief signal.
Blocks unsafe autonomy escalation; VH100 never exceeds ZAG for automation.
Risky duplication/drift pressure-check (Vegeta-style questioning of sameness).
Bridge and catalog boundaries; VH100 reinforces reference-not-access posture.
Future overseer surfaces may display posture class — read-only until chartered.

drp_dop_note: 14 DRP / 14 DOP governs all escalation beyond VH1; sacred and commercial paths stay human-gated per Hierarchy Chief and vault policy.

future_phases.summary: Read-only posture report script merging MCBURB policy, FBAP taxonomy, Traffic, CAR² summaries — no enforcement.
Operator-dashboard chips for posture class — UI read-only.
Chartered pressure tests and external scope — separate human approval; never bundled silently with Phase 1.
